name: PINtPOINT
summary: PINtPOINT is a beer-first pub discovery app that shows what's pouring at nearby pubs on a live radar and helps drinkers pick the right next pint rather than the nearest one.

capabilities.name: Live radar discovery
capabilities.description: Shows nearby pubs and taprooms as blips on a radar interface. Tapping a venue switches to a compass pointing toward it.

capabilities.name: Live tap list data
capabilities.description: Pulls and surfaces real-time tap lists from venues that publish them online, so users can see what's pouring before walking in.

capabilities.name: Beer style filtering
capabilities.description: Filter pubs by the beer style you want tonight: West Coast IPA, Hazy IPA, Bitter, Stout, Sour, Cask, Cider, and more.

capabilities.name: Create-a-Crawl
capabilities.description: Build a custom pub crawl with selected stops and total distance, then share the route with your group.

capabilities.name: Beer Alerts
capabilities.description: Watch specific beers and receive a notification when they appear on tap at any saved or nearby venue.

capabilities.name: PINtDEXTER recommendation engine
capabilities.description: Layered taste profile that learns via Sip-or-Skip binary swipes and Head-to-Head pair rounds, then scores each beer at nearby venues against the user's preferences, body/strength preferences, flavour-axis sliders (TUNeDEXTER), and a Safe/Adventurous exploration mode toggle. Scoring formula: 0.35 × top-beer match + 0.20 × top-3-depth + 0.20 × venue trust + 0.15 × proximity + 0.10 × exploration fit.

capabilities.name: Ghost Hunter (London)
capabilities.description: Reveals 500+ closed and demolished London pubs as purple blips on the radar. 327 pubs have archive photos attached. Tapping a ghost shows historical context.

capabilities.name: Troubled Pub Mode (England & Wales)
capabilities.description: Highlights pubs under financial pressure on the radar, using the FPI (Financial Pressure Index) data from ismypubfucked.com. Helps drinkers support at-risk locals.

capabilities.name: Tap Trumps
capabilities.description: Turns any pub into a shareable stats card with its top beers and a photo, for pub-crawl comparisons and social sharing.

audience: Craft beer drinkers, real-ale drinkers, pub regulars, visitors wanting a trustworthy local recommendation, and anyone looking for a specific beer style near them.
